headline: C.H. Robinson out of Florida ‘U-turn’ lawsuit
summary: C.H. Robinson has been removed as a defendant in a case that might have been key post-Montgomery litigation. The post C.H. Robinson out of Florida ‘U-turn’ lawsuit appeared first on FreightWaves.
